prevalence.source: European eating disorder epidemiology syntheses / WHO Europe

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: DSM-5/ICD-11 criteria with medical monitoring for purging complications

publicHealthSystem.screeningCoverage: variable; detection often via primary care and school health services
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate with CBT and multidisciplinary care; varies by member state

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Specialist eating disorder pathways in many health systems
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: CBT as first-line, nutritional counseling, SSRIs when indicated, and medical monitoring
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Wait times for specialist services and variable access across member states
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Established evidence-based psychotherapy capacity and multidisciplinary services in many countries
